1.content:
Welcome to the Grand Mansion, the place where dreams can, and if I may do say so myself, do come true!

Now reader, without further ado I must ask of you...

Where will our story in Grand Mansion take us this evening?


Will our story take us with, Gracie, the short, skinny and lusty blonde?

Or perhaps I could introduce you to Tyler, the 6 foot tall computer nerd?

No? Then maybe YOUR story will flow with yourself in the drivers seat?

There could always be a great story in store for Kai, the overly confident but dimwitted 5'4" pudgy bombshell?
1.title: Welcome to the Grand Mansion!

11.content:
Gracie was an average 20 year old girl, she was skinny, hot, horny and, above all else, rich.
 Gracie was born into money, and at an early age she was given access to "Daddy's card" to feed her spending habit. Despite the power of money she had at her fingertips, Gracie had always been told what to do, what to eat, where to go and how to act. Once Gracie reached the ripe age of 20, she was given access to her full inheritance. Gracie had millions of dollars in her grasp, and for once she was allowed to spend it on whatever she wanted.

The first thing Gracie did with her inheritance was she bought the car she always wanted, but never got from her father, a matte black lotus 2012 exige s. Equipped with her new car Gracie took to the roads for a night out

How does Gracie come across the Grand Mansion?

- Gracie goes for a road trip and buys a mansion she finds along the way
- Gracie receives the mansion as part her inheritance
- Gracie meets a guy and he brings her home to the Grand Mansion
- Gracie searches for a restaurant and the Grand Mansion kitchen pops up
- More options
11.title: Gracie, the skinny and lusty blonde

choices: Tyler decides to go sleep in the "abandoned" mansion
Spooky happenings of the mansion kind
12.content:
Tyler was a 23 year old hermit, having spent his years after highschool playing computer games and masturbating to anime tiddies instead of socializing or maintaining a job. On one soda fueled friday night of hardcore gaming Tylers mother knocked on his door2 and let herself in.

"Tyler, we need to have a talk." His mother said, and Tyler knowing exactly what he was in for snapped back, "MOM! Not now. I have a [game] tournament to train for!"

"This can't wait Tyler. I'm tired of this disrespect. I am your mother and I. Have had. Enough." she hissed, "I am selling the house. I am moving to Canada and you," she speaks while wiggling her finger in Tyler's face, "you cannot come with me. You need to find a job and move out before you end up on the streets. You better go out and find something to do tomorrow because I am going to be mad all day if I know you're home and I won't give you any peace. AND that should give you time TO FIND A JOB! Goodnight Tyler." And with that Tyler's mother slammed the door, and left Tyler near tears.

Tyler goes to bed shortly after the confrontation with his mother, racking his brain about what in the world he was supposed to do now...

How does Tyler come across the Mansion?

- He finds a job posting in the newspaper looking for a new live in butler
- He thinks about squatting in an "abandoned" mansion a few towns over
- He goes out for a drive and his car breaks down outside of a strange mansion
- He dreams of the mansion and is contacted by the mansions owners the next day
12.title: Tyler, the 6ft tall computer nerd

choices: The mansion is abandoned, but well kept
He is welcomed by a busty maid
He finds himself in a Grand garden, while looking for the entrance
123.content:
Tyler, not being able to sleep, decides to head out for a drive to clear his head of all his stress. He stops by a local gas station to pick up a pack of cigarettes and a drink, and checks his fuel gauge on the way out. Seeing that he has half a tank, he opts to fill up at a gas station further on his drive.

Once Tyler had hit the road again and made it to the highway he realized he did not exactly have a plan on where he was going. Tyler considered getting off at the next exit and sitting on the side of the road, but then he remembered something he did with his friends in high school. Tyler would pull out of the school's parking lot with his friends, and they would each set a rule for navigation. 'next time we see an SUV, take a left', 'if we stop at a red light take the next right', 'go straight for 3 songs',... Tyler started to lose himself in reminiscent thought.

"Fuck it, why not" Tyler said to himself, "after 2 cigarettes I'll pull off the highway and drive straight for a while."

. . . . . . .

14 minutes later, as he ashed his cigarette, Tyler found himself slowing down to pull off the highway with a dry throat and a regret for not buying light cigarettes. At the end of the off ramp Tyler was faced with only a left or a right turn and not his intended straight line. He had a moment to think and ultimately chose right, it was less effort only having to check his left side for oncoming traffic, after all...

And after another 15 minutes of driving slightly uphill. Tyler thought to himself that there was no oncoming traffic, in fact he hadn't seen a car since he got off the highway... Nor has he seen any houses for that matter, he's just seen the woods on either side of the road. Tyler takes a sip of his drink before lighting another cigarette and turning up his music to drown out the monotony.

After another few minutes of driving Tyler crests over the hill, seeing a much longer drive down a gentler slope, this side of the large hill has a rock and iron fence to his right side. 'This will be a much more fun ride than the hill I just drove up.' Excited no one was around, and seeing his opportunity to go really fast, Tyler put the peddle to the metal. 40 miles per hour, 50 miles per hour, 60 miles per hour! Tyler was approaching 70 miles per hour when suddenly his car started to sputter, the car quickly loosing power. Tyler starts to panic when he notices his gas gauge is still at half a tank, he quickly flicks it and watches as it drops down past E. Tylers heart sank as he knew it would a pain in the ass to get this situation sorted out.

Now coasting under the cars existing momentum, Tyler thought his best bet was to let himself ride down this hill in hopes of finding some kind gas station along the way. Tyler couldn't see far in front of his car, and with no headlights Tyler hurriedly debated if his decision to continue coasting was a good idea. If he hit a pedestrian or hit another car, he couldn't live with himself. He had to slow down and find somewhere to get help... but where!

After feathering his breaks and using the moonlight as a guide, Tyler noticed the fence to right opened up into a gate with a driveway ahead!

He slammed on his breaks, and nearly spun out before coming to a stop just in front of the gate. Stepping out of his car, he saw his breaks smoking. "Ugggh, now im going to need gas AND a mechanic!" Tyler said with frustration.

Tyler turned to the gated driveway, where he gazed upon a well lit iron gate with two big golden letters entrenched within it, "G.M."

'Well, if they're rich enough to have a big fancy fence they might be rich enough to help me out.'

Tyler reached his hands towards the gate, which opened easily with his touch, and started his way up the unlit driveway towards his fate...
123.title: Tyler has some car trouble

13.content:
Greetings sweethearts my name's Darrell Dalmatian as I'm about to tell you a story that you'll never forget, as yours truly a hard boiled private eye is sent to the Grand Mansion to investigate the disappearance of a very friendly wealthy beloved citizen who owns the Grand Mansion itself as I'll question the people who live and work at the Grand Mansion as my life will forever change once I step into the Grand Mansion itself.

The Year: December 2020.

The City: San Francisco California.

The time: Present day.

The Story: It all began one day at my private eye office in downtown San Francisco California as I was in my office doing some paperwork, when my intercom itself buzzed as my secretary Destiny Dalmatian spoke to me via our intercom.

"Mr. Dalmatian the city's mayor Doug Dalmatian is currently on line 1 as he says it's very important." Destiny said over the intercom.

"Okay put him through at once Ms. Dalmatian." I said to Ms. Dalmatian over the intercom as she transferred the call over to my phone in my office as I picked up the receiver itself and spoke to the city's mayor who was on the other line.

"Now then Mr. Mayor what it is you needed to speak to me about as my secretary said it was very important you spoke to me." I said as I spoke to the mayor of San Francisco city himself as he's well known beloved and respected.

"Geoffrey Reynolds a very friendly golden retriever who happens to be a very close friend of mine who happens to be one of San Francisco's well known wealthiest and beloved citizens who owns a place known as the Grand Mansion has disappeared as his family and the staff of the Grand Mansion are most worried about him as I'm most worried about him myself as you're the only one who can find out about what happened to him and find out if he's still alive and well." Mayor Dalmatian said as he himself including Godfrey's own family and the mansion's staff were worried about him.

"I'll find Mr. Reynolds myself free of charge as I'll also find out if he's alive as well Mr. Mayor." I said as I was gonna find Mr. Reynolds himself and find out if he's alive as well.

"Oh thank you thank you thank you so much Mr. Dalmatian and please be careful finding Mr. Reynolds as we can only hope he's still alive and well." Mayor Dalmatian excitedly said.

"Your welcome Mr. Mayor." I said as we both hung up as I put my telephoned down as I put my trench coat on and my fedora on as well as I walked on out of my office as I told my secretary to hold my calls until I came back.

"Hold my calls until I get back as I not only have a hunch that Mr. Reynolds is alive and well, but I also have a real bad feeling about this." I said to my secretary herself.

"Yes sir and please do come back in one piece as I don't know what I'll do if you don't come back."

"I'll be back in one piece sweetheart." I said to my secretary as I opened my private eye office's main door and walked down a flight of stairs towards the building's first floor where the main entrance was at as I stepped outside and walked over to where my car was at as I stepped into my car fastened my seatbelt and backed out of my parking spot as I drove to my destination the Grand Mansion.

Late that December afternoon I arrived at the Grand Mansion as I pulled up to where the mansion's front doors were at as I unbuckled my seatbelt and opened my car's driver side door as I stood outside the Grand Mansion itself as the mansion's butler greeted me.

"I take it you're the private eye we sent for, very well then sir if you would kindly follow me inside." The mansion's butler a British bulldog said as we walked into the mansion itself as the Reynolds family and staff were waiting in the mansion's living room as I immediately noticed they were feeling most distraught about their beloved patriarch and boss who disappeared.

Now it was time for me to speak to one of the family's members and or mansion's staff members themselves and find out about what happened to Mr. Reynolds himself.
13.title: First person
